narrative:
Fairfield Township has 782 registered voters, with 51.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.2 percentage points.
